brief.projectDescription: An immersive cyberpunk-themed Halloween event landing page designed to drive registrations through high-impact visuals and clear event logistics.

productScope.mvpDefinition: A single-page high-conversion landing site featuring event storytelling, visual highlights, a chronological schedule, and a lead-capture registration form.
productScope.coreOutcome: Convert visitors into registered event attendees.
productScope.businessGoal: Generate buzz and secure a high volume of sign-ups for the physical event.
productScope.audienceSummary: Young adults (18-35), tech enthusiasts, and fans of cyberpunk aesthetics and nightlife.

roles.summary: A person interested in attending a unique Halloween experience.
goals: Understand the event theme and value
Check the event timing and location

taskLoops.name: Event Registration Journey
taskLoops.summary: The path from landing on the page to completing the sign-up.
taskLoops.entryTrigger: Visitor lands on the page via social media or ad link.
steps: View hero section and event hook
Fill out name, contact, and preferences
taskLoops.successState: User sees a 'Registration Successful' message and data is captured.

capabilities.name: Immersive Event Information
capabilities.summary: Displaying event details with cyberpunk visual effects.

capabilities.name: Lead Capture System
capabilities.summary: A secure form to collect attendee information.

designIntent.colorDirection: Deep charcoal and obsidian backgrounds with high-contrast neon accents in magenta, cyan, and acid green.
designIntent.style: Cyberpunk 2077 inspired aesthetic with glitch effects, glowing borders, and industrial typography.

notes: The page uses smooth scrolling to navigate between sections.

layoutSections.intent: Provide quick access to event details and registration.
layoutSections.contentHints: Logo (glitch style), Links: Intro, Highlights, Schedule, CTA: 'REGISTER NOW'.

designPlan.goal: Keep the registration CTA omnipresent while allowing quick jumps to event details.
designPlan.roleFit: Optimized for the visitor who needs quick access to the schedule or registration form.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Supports the 'Navigate to registration' step of the core loop.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Makes the event-info-display accessible via anchor links.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Sticky header with glitch-logo, horizontal links, and a high-contrast neon CTA.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Slim, fixed-top bar with glassmorphism and a glowing bottom border.
designPlan.visualIntent: High-tech utility with magenta accents and monospace typography.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Smooth scroll to anchors with active state highlighting.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Minimalist labels to keep the focus on the 'REGISTER' action.
constraints: CTA must use a high-contrast neon green or magenta
designPlan.rationale: A sticky nav ensures the conversion goal is always one click away in a long-scroll experience.

layoutSections.contentHints: Social media icons (neon), Privacy Policy link, Event location address, Copyright.

designPlan.goal: Provide final logistical details and social proof links.
designPlan.roleFit: Serves the visitor looking for physical location or social media validation.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Acts as the terminal point of the scroll journey.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Displays static event info like address and social handles.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Three-column layout: Brand/Social, Quick Links, Location/Legal.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Industrial, heavy-bottom layout with dark obsidian background.
designPlan.visualIntent: Gritty and utilitarian with subtle scan-line textures.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Standard link hovers with neon glow effects.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Clear, concise text with iconic social representation.
constraints: Maintain high contrast for legal text
designPlan.rationale: The footer reinforces the gritty aesthetic while providing necessary logistical closure.

pages.title: Cyber-Night Halloween Home
pages.description: The main landing page for the cyberpunk Halloween event.

sections.intent: Immediate visual hook and event identity.
sections.contentHints: Animated background (neon rain/cityscape), H1: 'CYBER-HALLOWEEN 2024', Subtitle: 'Enter the Matrix of the Dead', Primary CTA: 'JOIN THE GRID'.

designPlan.role: Page opener and value proposition anchor
designPlan.goal: Capture attention instantly and establish the cyberpunk theme.
designPlan.roleFit: The visitor should immediately feel the 'high-tech, low-life' vibe.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: The entry trigger for the registration journey.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Showcases the 'Immersive Event Information' capability through visual effects.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Centered headline and CTA over a full-screen dynamic background.
designPlan.visualIntent: Electric and cinematic with neon rain or digital noise effects.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Primary CTA should pulse or have a glitch hover effect.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Short, punchy copy that emphasizes the date and the unique theme.
constraints: Text must remain legible over animated background
CTA must be above the fold
designPlan.rationale: The hero sets the emotional tone and provides the first opportunity for conversion.

sections.intent: Introduce the event story and theme.
sections.contentHints: Narrative text about a futuristic ghost story, 'The Glitch in the Afterlife' theme description.

designPlan.goal: Deepen the user's interest through thematic storytelling.
designPlan.roleFit: Engages the visitor's curiosity about the 'Cyber-Night' concept.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Provides the context needed before the user evaluates the highlights.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Uses typography and layout to reinforce the 'Immersive' capability.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Single column of focused narrative text with decorative side elements.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Spacious, editorial-style layout with large margins.
designPlan.visualIntent: Monospace 'terminal' style text with subtle flickering effects.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Atmospheric copy that frames the event as an 'experience' rather than just a party.
constraints: Use high-contrast text on dark background
designPlan.rationale: Storytelling builds the 'world' of the event, increasing the perceived value of attending.

sections.contentHints: Grid of cards: Neon Costume Contest, VR Ghost Hunt, Synthwave DJ Set, Cyber-Cocktail Bar.

designPlan.goal: List the specific attractions that justify the registration.
designPlan.roleFit: Answers the visitor's question: 'What will I actually do there?'
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: The 'Review highlights' step of the registration journey.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Displays event features in a structured, scannable format.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: 2x2 or 4-column grid of cards with icons and short descriptions.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Balanced grid with consistent card sizing.
designPlan.visualIntent: Cards with glowing borders (cyan/magenta) and industrial icons.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Hover states that intensify the glow or trigger a slight scale-up.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Feature-benefit pairing (e.g., 'Synthwave DJ Set - Lose yourself in the grid').
constraints: Ensure icons are recognizable in a cyberpunk style
designPlan.rationale: A grid layout allows for quick scanning of the event's diverse offerings.

sections.contentHints: Vertical timeline with neon glowing nodes: 20:00 Doors Open, 21:30 AI Ritual, 23:00 Costume Battle, 01:00 Midnight Glitch.

designPlan.goal: Communicate the flow of the night clearly.
designPlan.roleFit: Serves the visitor's need to check timing and plan their arrival.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Final informational step before the registration form.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Presents chronological data with high visual interest.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Vertical central line with alternating left/right event nodes.
designPlan.visualIntent: Pulsing neon nodes and connecting lines that look like a circuit board.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Nodes could expand on click/hover to show more detail.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Time-stamped entries with evocative event names.
constraints: Time stamps must be highly legible
designPlan.rationale: A timeline provides a sense of structure and builds anticipation for the night's peaks.

sections.contentHints: Input fields with glowing borders: Name, Email, Cyber-Alias (Optional). Submit button with glitch hover effect.

designPlan.goal: Collect user data with minimal friction and high thematic consistency.
designPlan.roleFit: The final action for the visitor to 'Secure a spot'.
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: The success state of the entire registration-loop.
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Implements the 'Lead Capture System' with validation.
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Single-column form with clear labels and a prominent submit button.
designPlan.layoutIntent: Centered, contained form box with a 'data-pad' aesthetic.
designPlan.visualIntent: Input fields with neon focus states and a 'Submit' button that looks like a system override.
designPlan.interactionIntent: Real-time validation feedback with 'system error' or 'access granted' styling.
designPlan.contentStrategy: Action-oriented labels and a clear success message upon submission.
constraints: Form must be fully accessible to screen readers
Submit button must be the most prominent element
designPlan.rationale: The form is the most critical part of the page; it must be visually exciting but functionally perfect.

pageDesignPlan.pageGoal: The main landing page for the cyberpunk Halloween event.
pageDesignPlan.roleFit: This page primarily serves Potential Attendee.
pageDesignPlan.capabilityFocus: This page should make Immersive Event Information, Lead Capture System understandable and actionable.
pageDesignPlan.taskLoopCoverage: Help users progress through Event Registration Journey, Event Registration Journey, Event Registration Journey, Event Registration Journey, Event Registration Journey.
pageDesignPlan.narrativeArc: Move from orientation to persuasion, then social proof, and finish with a decisive conversion close.
pageDesignPlan.layoutStrategy: Use section rhythm, spacing, and contrast to support the entry stage of the user journey rather than making every block equally loud.
hierarchy: The first viewport should establish context and value quickly.
Mid-page sections should deepen trust or explain the offer.
Lower-page sections should reduce friction and reinforce action.
pageDesignPlan.transitionStrategy: Make transitions feel intentional through spacing, contrast shifts, and restrained motion rather than decorative separators.
sharedShellNotes: Assume global layout sections frame the page experience.
Keep page-specific sections visually coherent with the shared shell.
constraints: Preserve the given section order unless a wrapper or grouping is required for coherence.
Avoid repetitive section pacing; vary density and emphasis across the page.
pageDesignPlan.rationale: Default page planner framed Cyber-Night Halloween Home around role needs and the MVP journey rather than isolated sections.
